[ En Frienda Pola Yaaru Machaan..
Avan Trenda Yellaam Maathi Vacchaan
Nee enga pona enga machaan
yenna yenni yenni yenga vechaan
Natpaala namma nenja thachaan
Nam kannil neera ponga vechaan ] (2)

Thozhanin thozhgalum annai madi
Avan thoorathil poothitta thoppul kodi
Kadhalai thaandiyum ulla padi
endrum natputhaan uyarndhadhu pathu padi

Un natpai naangal petrom
adhanaale yaavum petrom
melae melae sendrom
vaan megam pole nindrom

Pudhu paadhai neeye pottu thandhaai
yen paadhi valiyil vittu sendraai
Oru thaayai thaedum pillai aaanom
nee illai endraal engae povom..

En Frienda Pola Yaaru Machaan..
Avan Trenda Yellaam Maathi Vacchaan
Nee enga pona enga machaan
yenna yenni yenni yenga vechaan
Natpaala namma nenja thachaan
Nam kannil neera ponga vechaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song En Nanban ( Frienda ) Pola celebrates friendship and the joy it brings, highlighting the bond between friends.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Nanban, this song is a lively celebration among friends, showcasing their camaraderie and fun moments together.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Krish and Suchith Suresan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for En Nanban ( Frienda ) Pola was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was this song released?

This song was released on December 19, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: En Nanban ( Frienda ) Pola is a lively and energetic song from the movie Nanban that beautifully encapsulates the spirit of friendship. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and celebration, making it perfect for gatherings and parties. The song conveys the importance of camaraderie and the fun moments shared among friends. With its engaging melody and vibrant performances by Krish and Suchith Suresan, it leaves listeners feeling uplifted and nostalgic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of En Nanban ( Frienda ) Pola from the movie Nanban, where the harmonious voices of Krish and Suchith Suresan come together to create an unforgettable musical journey. This song perfectly captures the essence of friendship and celebration, making it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits. With Harrish Jeyaraj's captivating music and Viveka's engaging lyrics, this track is sure to resonate with listeners of all ages.
stanzaMeanings: Who is my friend? He has changed everything. Where have you gone, my friend? What have you done? Our friendship has made our hearts strong. You have placed tears in my eyes.
The friend’s friends are like a mother’s embrace. He has planted a garden nearby. Even love has its ups and downs, but friendship always rises above.
We have taken your friendship, so we all rise together like clouds in the sky.
You have shown me a new path, and I have lost my way. If you are not there, where will I go?
Who is my friend? He has changed everything. Where have you gone, my friend? What have you done? Our friendship has made our hearts strong. You have placed tears in my eyes.
